SEARCH
Package com.example.eventlottery

Class Organizer

java.lang.Object
com.example.eventlottery.Organizer
public class Organizer extends Object
This class models an organizer account stored in Firestore at organizers/{organizerId}. It is separate from entrant profiles (users collection); one device may have both.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    Organizer()
    No-arg constructor; sets role to organizer.
    Organizer(String organizerId, String displayName)
    Constructs an organizer with only a display label; other name fields empty.
    Organizer(String organizerId, String firstName, String lastName, String email, String phoneNumber)
    Constructs an organizer with full name and contact fields.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    String
    getDisplayName()
    Returns optional display name used when first/last name are empty.
    String
    getEmail()
    Returns the email.
    String
    getFirstName()
    Returns the first name.
    String
    getFullName()
    Returns a display name: first plus last name if non-blank, else displayName, else "Organizer".
    String
    getLastName()
    Returns the last name.
    String
    getOrganizerId()
    Returns the organizer document id.
    String
    getPhoneNumber()
    Returns the phone number.
    String
    getRole()
    Returns the role string (typically organizer).
    boolean
    isNotificationsEnabled()
    Returns whether organizer notifications are enabled.
    void

    Sets the optional display name.

    Sets the organizer document id.

  • Constructor Details

    • Organizer

      public Organizer()
      No-arg constructor; sets role to organizer.

    • Organizer

      public Organizer(String organizerId, String firstName, String lastName, String email, String phoneNumber)
      Constructs an organizer with full name and contact fields.
      Parameters:
      organizerId - Firestore document id for this organizer
      firstName - first name; null stored as empty
      lastName - last name; null stored as empty
      email - email; null stored as empty
      phoneNumber - phone; null stored as empty

    • Organizer

      public Organizer(String organizerId, String displayName)
      Constructs an organizer with only a display label; other name fields empty.
      Parameters:
      organizerId - Firestore document id
      displayName - fallback display name (e.g. "Organizer")

  • Method Details

    • isNotificationsEnabled

      public boolean isNotificationsEnabled()
      Returns whether organizer notifications are enabled.
      Returns:
      true if enabled

    • setNotificationsEnabled

      public void setNotificationsEnabled(boolean notificationsEnabled)
      Sets whether organizer notifications are enabled.
      Parameters:
      notificationsEnabled - true to enable

    • getFullName

      public String getFullName()
      Returns a display name: first plus last name if non-blank, else displayName, else "Organizer".
      Returns:
      resolved display string

    • getOrganizerId

      public String getOrganizerId()
      Returns the organizer document id.
      Returns:
      organizer id, or null if unset

    • setOrganizerId

      public void setOrganizerId(String organizerId)
      Sets the organizer document id.
      Parameters:
      organizerId - id string

    • getFirstName

      public String getFirstName()
      Returns the first name.
      Returns:
      first name, or null

    • setFirstName

      public void setFirstName(String firstName)
      Sets the first name.
      Parameters:
      firstName - first name

    • getLastName

      public String getLastName()
      Returns the last name.

    • setLastName

      public void setLastName(String lastName)
      Sets the last name.

      public String getEmail()
      Returns the email.
      Returns:
      email, or null

      public void setEmail(String email)
      Sets the email.
      Parameters:
      email - email address

    • getPhoneNumber

      public String getPhoneNumber()
      Returns the phone number.

      Parameters:
      phoneNumber - phone number

    • getDisplayName

      public String getDisplayName()
      Returns optional display name used when first/last name are empty.
      Returns:
      display name, or null

    • setDisplayName

      public void setDisplayName(String displayName)
      Sets the optional display name.
      Parameters:
      displayName - display name

    • getRole

      public String getRole()
      Returns the role string (typically organizer).
